title: The Guards Open Fire
description: Oimo, Kashii, Galley-La, and the Franky Family help the Straw Hats break through the government’s front line.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Marine Soldier, Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Enies Lobby guard. Oimo, Kashii, Galley-La, and the Franky Family help the Straw Hats break through the government’s front line.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey, hey, wait, wait a minute!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: No no, not that kind of funny!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Because while we were sailing here,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The way they laugh!? Their weapons!? Techniques!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Precisely!!! The punishers of Justice Island!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We also lost sight of straw hat.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: The time for judgewent has come!!!

summary: Oimo, Kashii, Galley-La, and the Franky Family help the Straw Hats break through the government’s front line.
